title: Metropolis Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Metropolis Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Metropolis Healthcare in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Metropolis Healthcare:
Metropolis Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metropolis Healthcare!
